title: End-to-End Coding Agent on the Harness

questions.question: Before reading the lesson: why does the end-to-end demo replace the LLM with a deterministic policy?
options: The LLM is too slow to run in tests.
The harness is what the lesson is testing; the policy is the substitutable seam.
Deterministic policies always outperform LLMs on coding tasks.
The lesson cannot afford the inference cost.
questions.explanation: The harness contract does not care whether the policy is an LLM or a state machine. Removing the LLM removes the network and the variance and turns the lesson into a reproducible integration test.
questions.question_zh: 在阅读课程之前: 为什么端到端 demo 用确定性策略替换 LLM?
options_zh: LLM 在测试中跑得太慢。
本节要测试的是 harness; 策略是可替换的接缝。
确定性策略在 coding 任务上总是优于 LLM。
本节负担不起推理成本。
questions.explanation_zh: harness 契约不在意策略是 LLM 还是状态机。去掉 LLM 就去掉了网络和方差,把课程变成一个可复现的集成测试。

questions.question: The agent's state machine has five states. In what order does it execute them on a normal pass?
options: SURVEY -> FIX -> VERIFY -> RUN_TESTS -> INSPECT.
SURVEY -> RUN_TESTS -> INSPECT -> FIX -> VERIFY.
RUN_TESTS -> SURVEY -> INSPECT -> FIX -> VERIFY.
SURVEY -> INSPECT -> FIX -> RUN_TESTS -> VERIFY.
questions.explanation: The agent surveys the project, runs the tests, inspects the failing test, fixes the bug, then verifies. RUN_TESTS comes before INSPECT because the test failure is the signal the policy reads.
questions.question_zh: agent 的状态机有 5 个状态。在正常一遍流程中,执行顺序是?
options_zh: SURVEY → FIX → VERIFY → RUN_TESTS → INSPECT。
SURVEY → RUN_TESTS → INSPECT → FIX → VERIFY。
RUN_TESTS → SURVEY → INSPECT → FIX → VERIFY。
SURVEY → INSPECT → FIX → RUN_TESTS → VERIFY。
questions.explanation_zh: agent 先 survey 项目,再 run_tests,然后 inspect 失败的测试、fix bug,最后 verify。RUN_TESTS 在 INSPECT 之前,因为测试失败正是策略读取的信号。

questions.question: The bundled fixture's bug is an off-by-one in src/fizz.py: range(1, n) instead of range(1, n + 1). Where does the policy decide to apply the fix?
options: Inside the SURVEY state, by reading the file header.
Inside the INSPECT state, after the test failure has named the expected output.
Inside the VERIFY state, after the rerun.
Outside the state machine, in the gate chain.
questions.explanation: INSPECT is where the policy reads the failing test and learns the expected shape. The fix is identified there and written in the next FIX state.
questions.question_zh: fixture 的 bug 是 src/fizz.py 里的 off-by-one: range(1, n) 应为 range(1, n + 1)。策略在哪个状态决定如何修?
options_zh: 在 SURVEY,通过读文件头。
在 INSPECT,在测试失败已说明期望输出后。
在 VERIFY,重新运行之后。
状态机之外,在 gate chain 里。
questions.explanation_zh: INSPECT 是策略读取失败测试、了解期望形态的地方。修复方案在那里识别,在下一个 FIX 状态写入。

questions.question: Every tool call goes through what chain of components in order?
options: Sandbox -> GateChain -> SpanBuilder -> ObservationLedger.
GateChain -> SpanBuilder -> Sandbox -> ObservationLedger.
SpanBuilder -> GateChain -> Sandbox -> ObservationLedger.
ObservationLedger -> GateChain -> Sandbox -> SpanBuilder.
questions.explanation: Gate first (allow / refuse), span next (so the refusal is also captured), sandbox third (only if allowed), ledger last (only on success). The lesson code wires it that way.
questions.question_zh: 每次工具调用按什么顺序经过哪些组件?
options_zh: Sandbox → GateChain → SpanBuilder → ObservationLedger。
GateChain → SpanBuilder → Sandbox → ObservationLedger。
SpanBuilder → GateChain → Sandbox → ObservationLedger。
ObservationLedger → GateChain → Sandbox → SpanBuilder。
questions.explanation_zh: 先 gate (允许 / 拒绝),然后 span (这样拒绝也被记录),再 sandbox (仅在允许时),最后 ledger (仅在成功时)。本节代码就是这样接的。

questions.question: You replace the deterministic policy with a real LLM. Which harness component changes?
options: The gate chain has to be rewritten to handle LLM stochasticity.
The sandbox has to be hardened with seccomp.
Nothing in the harness changes; the policy is the only piece that swaps.
The Prometheus exposition format becomes incompatible.
questions.explanation: The lesson's point: the harness is policy-agnostic. The seam is the next_action / observe interface. The LLM plugs in there without touching gate, sandbox, ledger, or spans.
questions.question_zh: 你把确定性策略换成真实 LLM。harness 哪个组件需要改?
options_zh: gate chain 必须改写以处理 LLM 随机性。
sandbox 必须用 seccomp 加固。
harness 不变,只换策略。
Prometheus 暴露格式会不兼容。
questions.explanation_zh: 本节的要点: harness 与策略无关。接缝是 next_action / observe 接口。LLM 接到那里,而不必触动 gate、sandbox、ledger 或 span。

questions.question: The demo asserts the agent solves the fixture in fewer than 12 steps. The deterministic policy uses 5. What is a real-LLM agent likely to do, and how does the harness handle it?
options: The LLM uses 5 steps too; the harness is unchanged.
The LLM may use more steps; the step_budget bounds the loop and an unsolved run is reported as a failure with a halted_reason.
The LLM cannot run inside this harness.
The harness silently extends the budget.
questions.explanation: The step budget is the loud, deterministic stopping criterion. An LLM that wanders gets capped and the report tells you exactly why.
questions.question_zh: demo 断言 agent 在 12 步以内解决 fixture。确定性策略用了 5 步。换成真实 LLM 大致会怎样,harness 如何处理?
options_zh: LLM 也只需 5 步; harness 不变。
LLM 可能用更多步; step_budget 限制循环,未解决的运行被报告为失败,带上 halted_reason。
LLM 在本 harness 中跑不了。
harness 会静默地延长预算。
questions.explanation_zh: step budget 是响亮、确定性的停止条件。漫游的 LLM 会被截断,报告会精确告诉你为什么。
